title: Realistic Cruelty
description: Add realistic and cruel effects into Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds some realistic and cruel effects.

Attacking mobs can make them bleed! Blood particles will eject from the place where they are hit.

The higher the damage you cause, the more blood they will spray. You can customize the multiplier in the configuration file.

This effect is applicable to most modded entities and projectiles.

**Screenshots:**
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QGIgmtG7/images/7d76fe1c9625defa9afb63bddd1fabceb2500d5c.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QGIgmtG7/images/dac215e9a13edca76957eaa80bc5d39c6b4da55c.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QGIgmtG7/images/5e487e271790de9be59f3d013a7df936505ee7e6.png)
The particle texture comes from BlockFront and Techgun. I haven't got their consent yet. If they don't allow me to do so, I will replace them.
